memberdef.name: input_tables
memberdef.initializer: = { { 0, 0, XSEM_BT0ROW0_FRAMES, EbdSetBT0Row0 }, { 0, 1, XSEM_BT0ROW1_FRAMES, EbdSetBT0Row1 }, { 0, 2, XSEM_BT0ROW2_FRAMES, EbdSetBT0Row2 }, { 0, 3, XSEM_BT0ROW3_FRAMES, EbdSetBT0Row3 }, { 3, 0, XSEM_BT3ROW0_FRAMES, EbdSetBT3Row0 }, { 3, 1, XSEM_BT3ROW1_FRAMES, EbdSetBT3Row1 }, { 3, 2, XSEM_BT3ROW2_FRAMES, EbdSetBT3Row2 }, { 3, 3, XSEM_BT3ROW3_FRAMES, EbdSetBT3Row3 }, { 4, 0, XSEM_BT4ROW0_FRAMES, EbdSetBT4Row0 }, { 4, 1, XSEM_BT4ROW1_FRAMES, EbdSetBT4Row1 }, { 4, 2, XSEM_BT4ROW2_FRAMES, EbdSetBT4Row2 }, { 4, 3, XSEM_BT4ROW3_FRAMES, EbdSetBT4Row3 }, { 5, 0, XSEM_BT5ROW0_FRAMES, EbdSetBT5Row0 }, { 5, 1, XSEM_BT5ROW1_FRAMES, EbdSetBT5Row1 }, { 5, 2, XSEM_BT5ROW2_FRAMES, EbdSetBT5Row2 }, { 5, 3, XSEM_BT5ROW3_FRAMES, EbdSetBT5Row3 }, }

briefdescription.para: This function finds and creates unique frame masks of all frames.

parameterdescription.para: : Set of Essential bit data of each row of a blocktype

briefdescription.para: This function generates xsem_ebdgoldendata.c file with XSem_EbdBuffer loaded with frame map offset, frame maps and unique frame masks.

parameterdescription.para: : file pointer BlockTypes[In] : Block type index Rows[In] : Row index

briefdescription.para: Main function, reformats essential bit info from xsem_ebdintern.c.
This file reformats the structured essential bit data in xsem_ebdintern.c file by mapping only unique frame data in to XSem_EbdBuffer and generates file "xsem_edbgoldendata.c".

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
0.1 hv 06/27/2022 Initial Creation 0.2 anv 05/10/2023 Modified to add copyright information in xsem_ebdgoldendata.c 0.3 anv 02/25/2025 Added support for SSIT devices.
